description: Style NoteA brand known for its unpredictable and unique styling baggit continues to awe us with their attractive designs for wallets. Available to you in an unusual design and at prices that do not burn a hole in your pocket, this wallet  is a must buy. So go ahead. Indulge.Product DetailsOlive green wallet with panelled frontKnit texture on top panel and branding on the bottomThree main compartmentsThree credit card slots on the left and one coin pocket on the rightMaterials and CareSyntheticWipe with damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 10 cmWidth: 12  cm
